title: tessaria absinthioides
intro: Tessaria absinthioides, also known as Chilean wormwood or Chilean absinthe, is a flowering plant native to the southern regions of South America, particularly in Chile and Argentina. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tessaria absinthioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for treating conditions such as malaria and respiratory infections. Tessaria absinthioides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a convenient and versatile way to harness its medicinal properties.
